response.original_title: Crime Does Not Pay: The Complete Shorts Collection (1935-1947) [6 Discs]
response.overview: Crime Does Not Pay constituted an anthology series of crime-themed playlets - short subject dramas produced by MGM between 1935-46. The entire 11-year run appears in this box set. Installments include: Buried Loot, Miracle Money, Don't Talk, You, the People, Phantoms, Inc. and many more."  MGM’s Crime Does Not Pay, oft imitated, never matched, an intimate look at mankind’s most seductive and destructive past time – CRIME.
response.tagline: Crime Does Not Pay, oft imitated, never matched, an intimate look at mankind’s most seductive and destructive past time – CRIME
